Headline: #22 Clark Temporary Reroute at Clark/North Shore
ShortDescription: 22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to fire department activity near Clark/North Shore.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Clark, Devon, Ridge, Pratt and Clark over regular route, due to fire department activity near Clark/North Shore.

Allow extra travel time.
